Off Calendar Mar-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order

Appearances:
Kimberly M. Drake, Esq., of Jarvis Fay Doporto & Gibson, Tel. 510.238.1400, for defendants and moving party;
Greg Lubisch II, plaintiff appearing telephonically on his own behalf.

RULING: The matter was not argued. Therefore, there being no opposition filed, DEFENDANTS PHILLIP MOSCONE, JAMES COLLINS, BRUCE CHAN, GARRETT WONG, GERARDO SANDOVAL and LILLIAN SING'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is granted. The mail service is untimely by one calendar day pursuant to CCP 1005 and CCP 12c. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
